title: Omni Time (AlienEvo Addon)
description: Alienevo Addon add aliens from Ben 10 Omniverse
body:
Add 2 aliens from Ben 10 Omniverse ShockSquatch and Gutrot

Find Yetti Liar
![Yetti Liar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f238398ace13c71cde098be2742c84b01269616.png)

ShockSquatch Obtain:

Find Yetti Fur in Yetti Liar

Get struck with Yetti Fur by lightning to unlock Alien Fur

Use it

Gutrot Obtain:

Craft Unknown Gas
![Unknown Gas Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58724e5864c45c6e0634ba9804fdf3436fc126a6.png)
